summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Nexthop AI and MatX each landed $500M Series B rounds, while Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics topped $450M-$500M for Series A—a staggering concentration of capital in Mountain View, Palo Alto, and San Jose. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, though seven companies are actively hiring. A pair of local events this week explore AI's societal impact, from voice tech to digital healthcare.
